nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 森林
nodes.summary: 森林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联402种鸟类，包括疣鼻棲鴨、Blue-throated piping guan、White-throated piping guan等402种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 火尾太阳鸟
nodes.summary: 火尾太阳鸟（Fire-tailed sunbird，学名 Aethopyga ignicauda），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联9个分布地点节点。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is found in the northern parts of the Indian subcontinent, primarily in the Himalayas, and also in some adjoining regions in Southeast Asia

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Eclipse males are similar to females but have brighter yellow bellies, scarlet uppertail coverts, and scarlet tail sides. They live in conifer forests at altitudes up to 4,000 meters, descending into the valleys during the cold season, wintering in broadleaved forests
